DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ROBERT MEYER AND DIANNE BOATE'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION DOCUMENTS, SET THREE, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MUST PAY SANCTIONS TO CROSS-DEFENDANTS OF $840 ($400 PER HOUR FOR TWO HOURS PLUS $40 IN COSTS) NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 15, 2011. WHERE, AS HERE, A PARTY SEEKS ATTORNEY'S FEES AS DAMAGES, NOT AS COSTS, THE OPPOSING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO FULL DISCOVERY OF THE AMOUNT AND BASES OF THE FEES CLAIMED, NOTWITHSTANDING THAT FEES INFORMATION IS NORMALLY IMMUNE FROM DISCOVERY AS PRIVILEGED. CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S POSITION LACKS SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. COMPLIANCE DATE FOR DISCOVERY - NOVEMBER 30, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ROBERT MEYER AND DIANNE BOATE'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET FOUR AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MUST PAY SANCTIONS TO CROSS-DEFENDANTS OF $1240 ($400 PER HOUR FOR THREE HOURS PLUS $40 IN COSTS) NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 15, 2011. WHERE, AS HERE, A PARTY SEEKS ATTORNEY'S FEES AS DAMAGES, NOT AS COSTS, THE OPPOSING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO FULL DISCOVERY OF THE AMOUNT AND BASES OF THE FEES CLAIMED, NOTWITHSTANDING THAT FEES INFORMATION IS NORMALLY IMMUNE FROM DISCOVERY AS PRIVILEGED. CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S POSITION LACKS SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. COMPLIANCE DATE FOR DISCOVERY - NOVEMBER 30, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS ROBERT MEYER AND DIANNE BOATE'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER IMPOSING ISSUE AND EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JANUARY 5, 2012. DAVID ELCHINOFF MUST APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 30, 2012. IF HE APPEARS FOR DEPOSITION BY THAT DATE, THE COURT WILL GRANT $1,940 IN MONETARY SANCTIONS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND DENY THE EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS. IF HE FAILS TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION BY THE END OF THE YEAR, THEN THE COURT WILL GRANT BOTH THE MONETARY SANCTIONS AND THE EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephen Leonard Collier, Esq. (415-771-9850), for Robert Meyer and Dianne Boate, Plaintiffs and moving parties.
Ron Galasi, Esq. (650-685-6200), for David Elchinoff, Defendant and opposing party.

Not opposed, no arguments heard. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFs ROBERT MEYER and DIANNE BOATE's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Against Defendant David Elchinoff is GRANTED including request for attorney's fees and costs in the amount of $3,240. Defendant David Elchinoff is in breach of the Settlement Agreement. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Imposing Issue And Evidentiary Sanctions And For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Continued To Jan-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS ROBERT MEYER AND DIANNE BOATE'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER IMPOSING ISSUE AND EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.
Appearances: Stephen L. Collier of the Tenderloin Housing Clinic (771.9850) for plaintiffs and moving parties; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued on the court's own motion to January 5, 2012. David Elchinoff must appear for deposition no later than December 30, 2012. If he appears for deposition by that date, the court will grant $1,940 in monetary sanctions in favor of plaintiff and deny the evidentiary sanctions. If he fails to appear for deposition by the end of the year, then the Court will grant both the monetary sanctions and the evidentiary sanctions. Order signed. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Respoens To Request For Production Documents, Set Three, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEPHEN L. COLLIER OF THE TENDERLOING HOUSING CLINIC, TEL. NO. 771-9850 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ROBERT MEYER AND DIANNE BOATE'S Motion To Compel Further Response To Request For Production Documents, Set Three, And Request For Sanctions IS Granted. Cross-complainant must pay sanctions to cross-defendants of $840 ($400 per hour for two hours plus $40 in costs) no later than December 15, 2011. Where, as here, a party seeks attorney's fees as damages, not as costs, the opposing party is entitled to full discovery of the amount and bases of the fees claimed, notwithstanding that fees information is normally immune from discovery as privileged.
Cross-complainant's position lacks substantial justification. COMPLIANCE DATE FOR DISCOVERY - NOVEMBER 30, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set Four And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-15-2011 Text Ruling

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ROBERT MEYER and DIANNE BOATE'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set Four And Request For Sanctions IS Granted. Cross-complainant must pay sanctions to cross-defendants of $1240 ($400 per hour for three hours plus $40 in costs) no later than December 15, 2011. Where, as here, a party seeks attorney's fees as damages, not as costs, the opposing party is entitled to full discovery of the amount and bases of the fees claimed, notwithstanding that fees information is normally immune from discovery as privileged. Cross-complainant's position lacks substantial justification. COMPLIANCE DATE FOR DISCOVERY - NOVEMBER 30, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)
